permissions.fallback_msg: This skill needs to read local data files or existing report files to build narratives. Allow read access within the workspace?
This skill wants to write generated reports, dashboards, or presentation files to the workspace. Allow write access within the workspace?
This skill includes Python matplotlib code for chart annotation and visualization generation. Allow execution of this code?
This skill may need to start a Python REPL session to run visualization scripts. Allow creation of a REPL session?
This skill wants to execute Python code (e.g., matplotlib chart generation) inside a REPL session. Allow execution?
This skill needs to read output or rendered results from the REPL session after running visualization code. Allow reading REPL output?
This skill references external resources (e.g., storytellingwithdata.com, duarte.com, Amazon). Allow fetching external web content?
This skill may load or dispatch authored sub-skills as part of presentation or reporting workflows. Allow skill loading?
